# Stepwise and Penalised Regression {#stepwise-penalised-regression}

```{r stepwise-penalised-regression-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/stepwise-penalised-regression-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/stepwise-penalised-regression/"
)
```

```{r child-stepwise-penalised-regression, child="../lecture-content/28-stepwise-penalised-regression.Rmd"}
```
